params.challengeId: The challenge ID (bytes32 UUID) — for event indexing

aggregateScores(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Read the 3 revealed scores from BoutsJudgeCommit and produce         a single canonical final score for this entry.

resolveDispute(bytes32,uint8,string).notice: Manually resolve a disputed entry.         Oracle sets the final score after human review.
